rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers from the current AADL component scope in AGREE contracts
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence like `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst task-specific AADL structural extraction rules
